title: Oligochaetochilus gibbosus
taxonomy: Oligochaetochilus gibbosus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The classification of this genus places it within the subfamily Apostasioideae. This subfamily is considered to be one of the most ancient lineages within the Orchidaceae. Oligochaetochilus gibbosus is primarily found in Southeast Asia. The genus is characterized by its unique and distinctive features, making it a notable member of the Orchidaceae family.
